description: Card combining a photograph and a quoted news excerpt. The top half is a color photograph taken inside an indoor training facility: a smiling woman in a white top and clear safety glasses faces a woman wearing safety glasses and a navy t-shirt printed 'AM / AMG'. Men in business attire and other people stand in the background under an exposed-beam ceiling. Across the lower portion, over a dark navy panel, is a large white serif italic headline 'Trade School BOOM!'. Below it, in a rounded white text box, is the 'Business Report' logo followed by body text: 'Enrollment in two-year vocational programs is now at its highest since record-keeping began in 1992, roughly double the level in 2000, according to a Washington Post analysis of federal data. For many young people, trades offer a path to entrepreneurship, flexibility and independence.'
notable_text: Trade School BOOM!; Enrollment in two-year vocational programs is now at its highest since record-keeping began in 1992, roughly double the level in 2000... trades offer a path to entrepreneurship, flexibility and independence.
